# .github

## Purpose
GitHub configuration for the OpenMake LLM repository. Contains GitHub Actions CI/CD workflow definitions that automate testing, building, and quality enforcement on push and pull request events.

## Subdirectories
| Directory | Purpose |
|-----------|---------|
| `workflows/` | GitHub Actions CI/CD pipelines — see `workflows/AGENTS.md` |
